description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image with three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs rustc --version && cargo --version then cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release and must not be allowed to fail. In the build stage add a build job that runs cargo build --release, stores the resulting binary at target/release/crochet as an artifact, and only runs on the master and develop branches. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs cargo doc --release, moves the generated documentation from target/doc/ to a public/ directory, publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact, and also only runs on the master and develop branches.
